title: 7 Lives of Chance
overview: As Chance's high school reunion approaches, she must come face to face with the one fear that she has yet to accept. In this psychedelic comedy, a lone red balloon, dearly cherished from childhood, multiplies as it leads Chance on a journey of acknowledgement.

trailers.title: 7 lives of Chance - official trailer
trailers.channel_name: Farmer Banks Helfrich for Florida House
